description: A tag, label, or category marker used for organizing and filtering knowledge entities

color.description: Hex color code for visual identification (e.g., '#FF5733')

group.description: Logical group or category the tag belongs to (e.g., 'language', 'domain', 'difficulty')

description.description: Brief explanation of what the tag represents and when it should be used

related_tags.description: Names of other tags semantically related to this one
